description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular cardboard parcel with visible wear, creases, and tape sealing the top. The front face features a bold, black label with Cyrillic text, suggesting it may be of Russian or Eastern European origin. One side displays a detailed nutrition facts label, indicating the parcel may contain food or consumable goods. The back side has a large warning label and additional faded text, while the remaining side shows taped-over shipping labels and two radiation warning symbols. The surface is rough and matte, with various stickers and tape remnants adding to its used appearance. The box appears sturdy and capable of supporting moderate weight on its flat surfaces.
description: A worn, taped cardboard parcel with Cyrillic labeling, nutrition facts, warning signs, and shipping stickers, showing signs of use and handling.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large Cyrillic label and a barcode sticker on a rough, brown cardboard surface.
description_view_1: This side displays a nutrition facts label and a strip of tape running along the top.
description_view_2: The back features a prominent warning label and faded text, with a generally plain cardboard appearance.
description_view_3: This side has overlapping white stickers, tape, and two radiation warning symbols near the bottom.
